text:
It wasn’t exactly an ordinary day; it was kind of a super ordinary day that just happened to involve a talking giraffe at the pet store.

Amina was browsing for a puppy. There must have been a brief moment when nature wanted her to adopt something cute. She was standing before Tumble, their namesake who looked like a tiny circus animal with a long neck, when this peculiar voice started singing off-key.

“Uh, hello? Are you here to hear my rendition of ‘Old MacDonald Had a Farm’?”

Amina turned toward the source of the noise. A giraffe stood there, waving her neck energetically. She wore a striped vest.

“Hey there! I’m just... um, looking for a good pal?”

Tumble chuckled deeply. “Well, you see, I’ve got lots of interesting friends. I sometimes perform musical numbers?”

Amina leaned closer, cautiously amused. “I suppose singing’s different? What’s your act?”

“I sing ‘Under
